raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declarative self-affirmation expressing a deliberate reorientation toward growth-oriented living",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "A prior state of coping and survival is being superseded",
    "Specific choices can produce nourishment and expansion",
    "Vitality is attainable as a baseline condition rather than exception"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The four lines maintain consistent thematic progression from contrast to agency to normalization without internal contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "When functioning as motivational language that supports intentional behavior change or emotional resilience in the speaker or audience",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "When read as verifiable factual assertions about psychological or physiological states rather than figurative self-expression"
}
